zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandra Stephens於1532年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓時，她的父親Henry Stephens32歲，母親Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg31歲。她於1536年與Thomas Fowler在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1595年2月2日在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯同豪斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandra Stephens于1532年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓时，她的父亲Henry Stephens32岁，母亲Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg31岁。她于1536年与Thomas Fowler在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1595年2月2日在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯同豪斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Alexandra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Alexander .  It was very little used in the English-speaking world before the 20th century, when it was brought in from Scandinavia and Eastern Europe. It owes its sudden rise in popularity in Britain at the end of the 19th century to  Queen Alexandra ,  Danish  wife of  Edward VII .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandra Stephens was born in 1532, in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Henry Stephens, was 32 and her mother, Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, was 31. She married Thomas Fowler in 1536, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 February 1595, in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandra Stephens est née en 1532, à Eastington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Stephens, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fowler en 1536, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1595, à Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandra Stephens 1532 in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Stephens 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg 31. Sie hat 1536 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Fowler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1595 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandra Stephens è nata il nel 1532 nel Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Henry Stephens, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fowler nel 1536, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 febbraio 1595, nel Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandra Stephensが1532年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエアスティントンで生まれた時，父Henry Stephensは32歳，母Lady Alice Alexandra de la Luggは31歳であった。1536年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでThomas Fowlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1595年2月2日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストーネハウゼで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandra Stephens(이)가 1532년 영국 그루스스터실르 이스틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Stephens(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Thomas Fowler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 2월 2일 영국 그루스스터실르 스톤하스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandra Stephens nasceu em 1532, em Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Stephens, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fowler em 1536, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1595, em Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandra Stephens родилась в 1532 г. в местности эастингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Stephens было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fowler в 1536 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 февраля 1595 г. в местности стоунэоус, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandra Stephens nació en 1532, en Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Stephens, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Alexandra de la Lugg, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Fowler en 1536, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1595, en Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
